description: Unit tests for the Alert component, testing its DOM interactions, event handling, and integration via jQuery in a Bootstrap-like project.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: The Alert component class being tested in these unit tests.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Alert instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns an existing Alert instance or creates a new one if none exists.

methods.name: _getConfig
methods.description: Protected method to get configuration options for the Alert (from context).

methods.name: close
methods.description: Closes the alert, triggering related events and animations.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the Alert instance, cleaning up data.
